creator: david.elliott3040@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 231212
Alternative patch with no changes to firmware

This patch bypasses the requirement to upgrade the RPI firmware, by copying the DTB for the RPI3b as stated by https://waldorf.waveform.org.uk/2021/the-pi-zero-2.html

This has been tested to work on the PI Zero 2 W and RPI3b with no issues.
